project_name: SafeNet - Modern AI-Powered Cyber Safety Website

theme.mode: Dark mode primary (matches cybersecurity theme), with Light mode toggle

headings.description: Used for all H1-H4. Conveys authoritative, modern, web3/tech energy.
headings.weights: Light (300) for elegance or Black (900) for impact

body.description: Clean, highly legible monospace-adjacent font for data and body copy.

rules: Headlines (>32px) MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em].
Never use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings.
Hierarchy gap: H1 to Subtitle jump shouldn't exceed 2 tailwind steps (e.g., text-6xl to text-2xl).

marketing_pages.description: Home, About, Tips, Scam Types. High visual impact.
marketing_pages.grid: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode): Asymmetrical grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, wide gaps (gap-8).
marketing_pages.hero_section: Dark overlay on background (bg-black/40). Overlapping elements, non-centered typography.
marketing_pages.surfaces: Crystal Glassmorphism for sticky nav (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/60, 1px inner border). Tracing Beam borders for Feature cards.

dashboard_pages.grid: High Density Grid: Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). 1px solid strokes instead of soft shadows.
dashboard_pages.surfaces: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look): border-r border-b border-border/40.

chatbot_ui.style: Streaming responses, visible stop buttons, typing indicators. Low-friction feedback (thumbs up/down). High contrast chat bubbles.

grids.general: Always use generous spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12). Containers with border must have internal padding. Start with mobile-first grid-cols-1.
grids.technical: Grid items must be direct children of grid containers. Overwrite stretch behavior using align-items: start where necessary.

component_rules.general: Use pure HTML + Tailwind CSS for structural layouts in marketing pages to achieve asymmetry. For interactive logic (Forms, Modals), always use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them to remove default Vercel looks.
component_rules.buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp-edged. Must have interaction animations. Explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-sky-600 hover:text-white).
component_rules.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Form, Checkbox. Do not use native HTML elements.
component_rules.dialogs: Use Shadcn Dialogs. Background must not be completely transparent.
component_rules.toasts: Use sonner for notifications. Import from /app/src/components/ui/sonner.js.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle grain or noise overlays over the background to break digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.shapes: Sharp edges or minimal border-radius (max 8px) for tech/authority vibe.
visual_enhancers.lines: 1px delicate inner strokes for glass panels.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Hover must explicitly set text color.

rules: No universal transitions (transition: all is FORBIDDEN).
Micro-interactions: Buttons translate-y slightly or glow on hover.

accessibility.contrast: APCA or WCAG AA minimum 4.5:1 for body, 3:1 for large text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
accessibility.focus: High contrast focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-400 focus:outline-none).

media.images: Never use placeholder images. Always preserve subjects. Apply dark overlays (max bg-black/50) over hero images to ensure text contrast.

3d_libraries.recommendation: TSParticles or pure CSS generative backgrounds for subtle floating nodes/mesh behind the Hero or Chatbot section.
3d_libraries.instructions: Keep background transparent, lazy load elements so performance is preserved.

image_urls.description: Abstract blue lines and dots on black background. Place behind the hero section with a bg-black/40 overlay.
A glowing holographic brain object. Ideal for the AI Scam Detection page or AI Assistant feature card.
Padlock on laptop with light trails. Great for the Scam Prevention Types or Cyber Safety Tips section.
A glass shield object with a blue background. Can be used for the Quiz section or as a visual anchor in the Report a Scam page.

instructions_to_main_agent: You have .js files, so apply guidelines to .js (not .tsx) files.
Install required fonts in the global CSS or index.html: Google Fonts 'Unbounded' and 'IBM Plex Sans'.
Install framer-motion for UI animations and sonner for toast notifications.
Implement a dark/light mode toggle in the nav, default to dark.
NEVER use generic placeholder text for image alt tags or missing content.
Ensure the hero header text is NOT centered; use asymmetrical layout.
Use standard semantic HTML sections inside custom UI components.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Use sonner for toasts, located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.js.
GENERAL_UI_UX_DESIGN_GUIDELINES: Always add GENERAL UI UX DESIGN GUIDELINES. All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
Data-testid should be kebab-case, role-based (NOT appearance-based). Example: data-testid='login-form-submit-button'.
